infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photos to upload game videos.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to record game footage.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow HighlightReel to access your camera to record games.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow HighlightReel to access your videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow HighlightReel to save highlight reels.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow HighlightReel to access your videos to create highlights.
